articles.title: Tyra Banks Sues Netflix for Defamation Following 'America’s Next Top Model' Documentary - TMZ
articles.description: Tyra Banks ain't just serving looks ... she just filed a defamation lawsuit against Netflix following her participation in their "Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model" docuseries.
